nasb.text: Give instruction to a wise man and he will be still wiser, Teach a righteous man and he will increase his learning.

esv.text: Give instruction to a wise man, and he will be still wiser; teach a righteous man, and he will increase in learning.

cnv.text: 教導智慧人，他就越有智慧； 指教義人，他就增加學問。

ccb.text: 教导智者，他就更有智慧； 指教义人，他就更有见识。

csbs.text: 指教智慧人，他就更有智慧； 教导义人，他就增添学问。
